summary: Pantone Shade Management System testing completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI fully verified - Pantone Library tab in TechOps page working correctly with all CRUD operations, vendor mapping, search/filter functionality, and import/export features.
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed route ordering issue in pantone_routes.py - moved /shades/export and /shades/download-template routes BEFORE /shades/{shade_id} to prevent FastAPI from matching 'export' and 'download-template' as shade_id values
All Pantone CRUD endpoints working correctly with proper validation and error handling
Vendor master batch mapping with QC approval workflow fully functional
Role-based access control working - only master_admin and quality_inspector can approve/reject vendor mappings
Excel export/import functionality working with proper template generation
seed_data_creation: 3 test Pantone shades exist: 485 C (Bright Red), 2728 C (Royal Blue), 360 C (Grass Green). 504 vendors available for mapping.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Pantone Shade Management System fully tested. Key verifications: 1) Pantone Library tab in TechOps page loads correctly. 2) 4 Pantone shades displayed with color swatches, category badges, and color family badges. 3) Add Pantone dialog with all form fields working. 4) Edit Pantone dialog pre-populates existing data. 5) Delete/deprecate functionality available. 6) Search by code/name working. 7) Category filter (INP/INM/ACC) working. 8) Color family filter working. 9) Export button downloads Excel file. 10) Import dialog with Download Template button working. 11) Expand shade row shows Vendor Master Batches section. 12) Add Vendor dialog with 504 vendors available. 13) Stats cards showing Total Shades, With Approved Vendors, Pending Vendor Setup, Total Vendor Mappings.

backend_api.GET /api/pantone/shades: PASS - List all shades with filters
backend_api.GET /api/pantone/shades/{id}: PASS - Get single shade with vendor mappings

bug_fix_applied.issue: Export and Download Template endpoints returning 404 with 'Pantone shade not found' error
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: Route ordering issue in FastAPI - /shades/{shade_id} was defined before /shades/export and /shades/download-template, causing FastAPI to match 'export' and 'download-template' as shade_id values
bug_fix_applied.fix: Moved /shades/export and /shades/download-template routes BEFORE /shades/{shade_id} in pantone_routes.py
